title: Shares of China AI 'tiger' Zhipu surge 35% after revenue doubles in first earnings report
summary_full: Shares of Chinese AI company Zhipu surged over 30% in trading, after posting strong revenue growth in its first earnings report since its IPO.
summary_public: Shares of Chinese AI company Zhipu surged over 30% in trading, after posting strong revenue growth in its first earnings report since its IPO.
